title: Kubernetes Engineer
description: We are looking for a Kubernetes Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, deploying, and maintaining our container orchestration infrastructure. This role is critical to ensuring our applications run reliably and efficiently at scale across multiple environments.

mustHave: AWS EKS, Azure AKS, or GCP GKE
Helm charts and Kubernetes manifest management
Networking concepts (DNS, load balancing, CNI plugins)

responsibilities: Design, deploy, and manage production-grade Kubernetes clusters
Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines for containerized applications
Develop and enforce best practices for container security and compliance
Monitor cluster health, performance, and capacity planning
Create and maintain Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Helm, and Kustomize
Troubleshoot complex issues across networking, storage, and compute layers
Collaborate with development teams to optimize application deployments
Implement service mesh solutions and manage ingress/egress traffic
Automate operational tasks and improve platform reliability
Document architecture, runbooks, and operational procedures
interviewProcess: 30min culture fit conversation with engineering leadership
